name: Pele
history: Brazil legend, 3× FIFA World Cup winner (1958, 1962, 1970), played for Santos and New York Cosmos.

name: Neymar Jr
history: Played for Santos, Barcelona, PSG, and Al Hilal. Key player for Brazil national team.

name: Ronaldo Nazario
history: 2× World Cup winner (1994, 2002 squad), played for Barcelona, Inter Milan, Real Madrid.

name: Ronaldinho
history: Ballon d'Or winner (2005), played for Barcelona, AC Milan, and Brazil national team.

name: Rivaldo
history: 1999 Ballon d'Or winner, played for Barcelona and AC Milan, World Cup winner 2002.

name: Kaka
history: 2007 Ballon d'Or winner, played for AC Milan and Real Madrid.

name: Romario
history: FIFA World Cup winner 1994, prolific striker for PSV Eindhoven and Barcelona.

name: Zico
history: Flamengo legend, known as the 'White Pele', iconic Brazilian playmaker.

name: Cafu
history: Captain of Brazil in 2002 World Cup win, played for Roma and AC Milan.

name: Roberto Carlos
history: Famous for powerful free kicks, played for Real Madrid and Brazil national team.

name: Bebeto
history: World Cup winner 1994, known for partnership with Romario.

name: Dani Alves
history: One of the most decorated footballers, played for Barcelona, Juventus, PSG.

name: Thiago Silva
history: Brazil captain for many years, played for PSG, AC Milan, Chelsea.

name: Marcelo
history: Real Madrid legend, multiple Champions League winner.

name: Vinicius Jr
history: Real Madrid winger, rising star of Brazil national team, known for speed and dribbling.
